roles.title: Engineering Manager, Agent Prompts & Evals
roles.why_match: Directly maps to the candidate's Quality Engineering background. This team owns the eval frameworks, regression-detection systems, and system-prompt pipelines that every Claude model launch depends on — essentially the 'Head of Quality Engineering for AI/ML systems' profile priority #2. Leading a QE org of ~40 and pivoting to AI aligns tightly with this role's need for a manager who bridges product engineering and model-behavior quality.

roles.title: Engineering Manager, Platform Foundations
roles.why_match: Requires 10+ years of engineering experience with 8+ years of engineering leadership including running a multi-team organization and managing managers at significant scale — a strong match for the candidate's 21+ year profile leading a ~40-person org. The mandate covers multi-cloud AI product infrastructure, developer velocity, and quality bar-setting, aligning with priority #1 (Director/VP AI Platform Engineering) and priority #4 (Director/VP Engineering with explicit AI/platform scope).

roles.title: Engineering Manager, API Core
roles.location: San Francisco, CA | New York City, NY | Seattle, WA
roles.why_match: A high-visibility leadership role reporting to the Head of API Engineering, responsible for the Claude API hot path — throughput, efficiency, rate limiting, and platform abstractions. Requires senior engineering leadership able to represent technical tradeoffs to executives and cross-org capacity-planning forums. Matches priority #4 (Director/VP Engineering with AI/platform scope) and priority #5 (senior/leadership-track platform infra roles).

roles.title: Engineering Manager, Vertical AI Products (Multiple Roles — Financial Services, Life Sciences, Healthcare)
roles.why_match: Anthropic is hiring Engineering Managers to build Claude products 0→1 for Financial Services, Life Sciences, and Healthcare verticals. The candidate's background at a large financial institution leading a quality engineering org is a strong contextual fit for the Financial Services vertical specifically, matching priority #4 (Director/VP Engineering with explicit AI scope) and the AI Transformation Lead profile in priority #3.

roles.title: Engineering Manager, Inference Developer Productivity
roles.why_match: Leads a new team focused on developer productivity within Anthropic's Inference org — owning toolchains, workflows, CI/CD, and feedback loops across GPU/TPU/Trainium platforms. The quality-engineering and engineering-leadership background translates well: eliminating bottlenecks, setting process standards, and enabling engineering velocity at scale mirror QE leadership responsibilities. Matches priority #5 (senior/leadership-track AI/ML infra roles).

roles.title: Engineering Manager, Accelerator Platform
roles.why_match: Owns bringup and normalization of new AI hardware platforms (TPUs, GPUs, Trainium) for Anthropic's first-party inference fleet, partnering with AWS, GCP, and Azure on hardware roadmaps and capacity planning. A senior-track infrastructure leadership role squarely within AI/ML platform scope, matching priority #5 and partially priority #1 for candidates willing to deepen hardware-adjacent platform expertise.
